title: Biome Dimensions
description: Simple Mod that adds portals to multiple biome dimensions and a super flat world.
body:
# DISCLAIMER
This mod is not updated too regularly, biomes will be added when people request them, along with mod updates, or I want them, if you want to request it, my discord is below, you can also use it to report any problems or suggestions.

**Discord: imcrime**

**However if you message me on discord, make sure in your first message to say that you're here about the mod, otherwise I'll ignore it(I've been getting a lot of spam).**

## Description
Simply a mod that uses vanilla items and blocks to make portals to other dimensions, based off of a biome. There are the main overworld biomes, a super flat world, and the nether biomes(except Nether Wastes). Eventually caves will be added to, but no timeline is made for it.

### Dependencies
Fabric Api :3

## About SuperFlat Dimension(Plains Biome)
No daylight cycle

1 Block here = 8 Blocks in the overworld(can be changed if requested)

Top layer: Grass Block x 1

Middle Layer1: Dirt x 3

Middle Layer2: Stone x 50

Bottom Layer: Bedrock x 1

## About Regular Dimensions
1 Block here = 1 Block in the overworld, its really the exact same just only 1 biome.

## Biomes and Portals, Nether
All portals are lit with an eye of ender


```
minecraft:basalt_deltas - Basalt

minecraft:crimson_forest - Stripped Crimson Hyphae

minecraft:warped_forest - Stripped Warped Hyphae

minecraft:soul_sand_valley - Soul Soil
```


## Biomes and Portals, Overworld
All portals are lit with an eye of ender

Note the difference between WOOD and LOGS, the wood has the bark texture on all sides, crafted by 4 logs in a square in the crafting table


```
minecraft:plains - Stripped Oak Wood

minecraft:plains - Stripped Oak Log <-- SuperFlat

minecraft:taiga - Spruce Wood

minecraft:old_growth_birch_forest - Birch Wood

minecraft:cherry_grove - Cherry Wood

minecraft:dark_forest - Dark Oak Wood

minecraft:swamp - Mud Bricks

minecraft:forest - Oak Wood

minecraft:pale_garden - Pale Oak Wood <- 1.21.5 Only

minecraft:bamboo_jungle - Bamboo Block

minecraft:desert - Smooth Sandstone

minecraft:mangrove_swamp - Mangrove Wood

minecraft:jungle - Jungle Wood

*Oceans - Prismarine Bricks
```
*The ocean dimension consists of warm ocean, deep lukewarm ocean, deep ocean, and very large beaches, due to me goofing the file up, its still perfectly usable, the beaches are just weird.


## Modpacks / Reuse / etc.
You can use it for whatever you want, just give proper credit to me, and a link to this page <3
